narrative.headline: What 2015 Honda Accord owners report most
narrative.summary: Electrical system faults dominate owner reports, with complaints spanning infotainment malfunctions and more serious incidents. Engine and steering complaints describe unexpected power loss while braking and steering wheels that lock or become very difficult to turn mid-maneuver. A smaller share of owners report powertrain roughness, including side-to-side sway and notable vibration at low to moderate speeds.

issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: Owners report infotainment features failing to function as described, such as hands-free text display not working despite the vehicle being marketed with that capability. · 3 fire · 3 crash · 4 injured

issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: Owners report sudden loss of power while driving with the brakes engaged, followed by the vehicle resuming normal operation on its own shortly after. · 2 fire · 4 crash · 3 injured

issues.title: Steering
issues.blurb: Owners report the steering wheel locking up or becoming extremely difficult to turn during maneuvers, in some cases leading to the vehicle striking a curb. · 1 fire · 12 crash · 8 injured

issues.title: Power Train
issues.blurb: Owners of CVT-equipped vehicles report pronounced side-to-side sway and high-amplitude vibration at low to moderate speeds, particularly on downward slopes. · 1 crash
